title: About / Colophon
surface: Author + publication concept, in the publication's voice
summary: An About page that frames 'what this publication is' in the same voice as the posts. Hiring-evaluator persona's primary positioning-proof surface.

strategy.decision: Write the About page in the publication's voice (D5 register), with the editorial sentence (D2) at the top, author identity below, colophon details below that. No 'Hire me' CTA; no 'Subscribe' CTA in this surface (subscribe-follow is its own surface).
strategy.why: Hiring-evaluator persona arrives via LinkedIn or portfolio link, reads the first post top-to-bottom, then checks About to test for consistency. If About is marketing copy and the posts are practice, the inconsistency reads as the rigorous post being a fluke. About must read as the same voice as the posts — sample of practice, not pitch.
strategy.shipped: v1 has no dedicated About page on the blog surface; author identity surfaces in post bylines and the global ninochavez.co /about route handles the portfolio-level positioning. Per hiring-evaluator persona, the v1 right-rail 'Currently Surfacing / Recent Series / Also Here' panels do some of this work but inconsistently.
strategy.gap: v2 adds a dedicated About surface inside the publication, in the publication's voice, with: D2 editorial sentence at top, author identity + positioning sentence (architect-who-directs-agents, not engineer-who-types-code), colophon (publication start, format conventions, any cadence promise per D4).
strategy.question: Does About link to ninochavez.co portfolio /about for deeper author context, or is About self-contained? Recommend linking — keeps the publication About focused on the publication, not the person's broader work.

breaksFromV1: dedicated About surface inside the publication (vs implicit-only via right-rail and global /about)
editorial sentence at top of page (per D2)
colophon section with cadence + format conventions (per D4)

currentState.summary: v1 publication has no dedicated About surface; global /about handles portfolio-level author identity. Right-rail panels on blog home do partial work.
currentState.annotation: v2 adds a publication-scoped About that reads as the publication's voice (Rule 1, Rule 3). Hiring-evaluator persona's primary positioning-proof surface.
